modules.name: HoloSuite Core
modules.pitch: The sci-fi launcher and registration layer that makes HoloSuite feel like one operating system.

modules.name: CyberCall
modules.pitch: Holographic calls, player-to-GM calling, contacts, ringtones, and private message threads.

modules.name: Security Cameras
modules.pitch: Live-feeling and static camera feeds wrapped in cinematic cyberpunk overlays.
features: Online, offline, corrupted, and restricted states

modules.name: CSI Toolkit
modules.pitch: Collaborative case boards for evidence, suspects, locations, timelines, and theories.

modules.name: Galaxy Map
modules.pitch: Cinematic star maps with clickable systems, travel routes, ship movement, and campaign reveals.

modules.name: Bounty Board
modules.pitch: A sci-fi contract terminal for creating, publishing, claiming, and resolving jobs.

modules.name: Critical Cut-In
modules.pitch: Sci-fi critical hit animations triggered by qualifying natural d20 results.

modules.name: HoloSuite Hacking
modules.pitch: Playable cyberpunk hacking minigames where skill checks shape puzzle difficulty.

modules.name: Pulse Scanner
modules.pitch: Cinematic scanner pulses for GM-placed targets, hidden signatures, scan difficulty, and table-wide reveals.
